(Translated by Google)
It's a good place for a quick stop
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoc1BPaTVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nos atendieron rápido. Me llamó la atención que nos dijeron que no cargaban más de $3.000 de nafta por el tema del abastecimiento (estaba muy concurrida la estación). Los baños maso.

(Translated by Google)
We were served quickly. I was surprised when they told us they didn't charge more than $3,000 worth of gas due to fuel shortages (the station was very busy). The bathrooms were so-so.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNE1pVzdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tiene mucha sombra, verde, buen lugar, pero los baños no tenían papel y olían mal (cuando fui) y no tenían combustible.

(Translated by Google)
It has a lot of shade, greenery, a nice place, but the bathrooms had no toilet paper and smelled bad (when I went) and they had no fuel.
